## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Pearce Burkett for Account Strategist role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pearce has relevant experience in account management, sales, and product development from previous roles at MVF and Relovo](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [The Account Strategist role will involve client management, workflow customization, and collaborating with engineering on product development](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [GrowthX is looking to hire one person for this role, with compensation around $140k base (potential for variable pay later)](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Start date would be September due to Pearce's planned August travel](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Reports to Andi, who leads customer operations](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Combines account management with operational/technical work](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Involves defining and building out client workflows and offerings](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Collaborates closely with CEO Marcel and engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Manages full client lifecycle from implementation to long-term success](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### Pearce's Background

  - [Graduated 2017, started at MVF doing digital marketing/lead gen](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Progressed from sales exec to senior AE, consistently exceeding quotas](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Built out account management function, grew portfolio 57% to $1.5M MRR](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Joined Relovo as founding AE in 2022, did full-cycle sales and client support](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Experience with AI/ML workflows, data analysis, and product development](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### GrowthX Product & Processes

  - [Configures AI workflows to generate content (blogs, images, LinkedIn posts)](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [8-week intensive onboarding period with clients](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [\~100 templated workflows that need customization for each client](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Two main implementation types: editorial content and custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Account Strategist scopes workflows, engineering builds them](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Company Culture & Structure

  - [Fully remote, globally distributed team (70+ people)](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Biweekly all-hands meetings and interest-based Slack channels](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [US-based team members have opportunities for in-person meetings](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Recently brought on managing directors to help with strategy](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)

### Challenges & Growth

  - [Experienced churn issues due to rapid growth and scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Lack of training/support for new hires managing existing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Working on building out long-term client success processes](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to finalize take-home exercise for Pearce](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Pearce to complete exercise and present to Andi and Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Tucker to follow up with Pearce by end of day regarding next steps](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=2799.0)
  - [Potential September start date if hired, due to Pearce's August travel plans](https://fathom.video/share/otz3mnxrtYKswPwfAW_yxFW-tEVcv_yC?tab=summary&timestamp=3006.0)
